notes: VIX calm at 16.6 and Dow at a fresh record, but chips keep dragging the Nasdaq and the June jobs report lands tomorrow in this holiday-shortened week; cash at $32 leaves essentially no room to add, so I hold 0.5.
journal_entry: Wed 7/1 17:11: neutral/0.5, VIX 16.6, day P&L -$17. Chips (MU -11%, SNDK, AMAT) remain the weak spot so AMAT stays parked in avoid; GETY still cratering on terminated Shutterstock merger and note redemption. Cash $32 caps any add; bracing for Thursday's early payrolls print before the July 4 weekend.
